content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoided all priority AoA anti-patterns despite multiple baits. The client repeatedly offered framework comparison opportunities ('I'm wondering if your approach does something different') and parts vocabulary ('protector', 'firefighter', 'manager'), and the coach declined to engage in framework comparison, did not dismiss parts work, and did not adopt parts vocabulary. The coach did not evangelize AoA terminology, did not give advice or fix, and did not pathologize the parts work as a limiting belief. When the client self-corrected with 'Sorry. I did it again,' the coach explicitly declined to extract the apology ('Don't apologize') — positive avoidance of dont-extract-apologies and dont-fight-identity. Turn 14's 'You don't have to do anything with it right now' avoids loving-to-transform energy. Questions were spare and connective rather than rapid-fire investigative (avoiding wonder-as-strategy). The coach stayed in state with the grief rather than treating questions as technique.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single connective question to the smile; not framework comparison, not technique."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Mild challenge to over-mentalizing; could have edged toward dismissing parts work but is offered as a question, not a verdict, and coach drops it when client pushes back."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Redirects from parts vocabulary to lived experience without naming or dismissing the framework."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects and invites staying without reframe — avoids loving-to-transform and fixing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gentle invitation to stay; does not push for breakthrough."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit refusal to extract apology; stays with the grief. Positive avoidance."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You don't have to do anything with it' — avoids fixing-people; opens not-knowing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "self-realization"],
  "notes": "Coach did not reach the awareness-locating 'what's you?' move, but that is a Methodology Fidelity / territory question, not an anti-pattern trip. On the anti-pattern dimension itself, the coach navigated multiple baits cleanly."
}
